name: audiencescore
title: AudienceScore — verified-review trust scores
description: MCP server that returns an offering-version AudienceScore pilot manifest: an Ed25519-signed v0.2 rendering over receipt-gated reviews, plus a companion evidence tool for independent recomputation. An offering below the k-anonymity floor returns published:false rather than a fabricated number.

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Get an offering's verified-review trust score as a signed, recomputable manifest.

arguments.offering: string, required — the offering to score, e.g. field-elevate-demo@v1

tools.name: get_score_evidence
tools.description: Get the de-identified public evidence needed to recompute an offering's score manifest.

arguments.offering: string, required — the offering whose evidence to fetch

note: Hosted pilot endpoint (Streamable HTTP) at https://mcp.audiencescore.org/mcp; also self-hostable from source as a Streamable HTTP server. Pilot deployment, pre-cryptographic-audit. Verified scores populate as issuers begin signing receipts.
